plugins.name: p-wiki
plugins.description: Persistent markdown knowledge wiki under docs/wiki/. Skills: init, ingest, compile, query, lint, reconcile.

plugins.name: p-flow
plugins.description: Task development flow for Claude: secrets deny-list, Conventional Commits + <type>/<slug> branches, spec templates, brainstorm → plan → TDD → verify → review → push pipeline (review skills dispatch general-purpose with inline reviewer templates). Commands: init, task-start, task-end. Skills: using-p-flow, init, task-brainstorming, writing-plan (TDD-aligned or generic), test-driven-development, verification-before-completion, requesting-code-review, requesting-task-review, receiving-code-review, using-git-worktrees, writing-skills. Discoverable via SessionStart hook.

plugins.name: p-tasks
plugins.description: Task tracker (task → sub-task) with FS and Jira destinations, one-way sync. Skills: init, add, set, next, summary, sync.

plugins.name: p-statusline
plugins.description: Custom Claude Code status line (context, rate limits, git, RAM). Skills: install.
